---
name: Specification proposal
about: Propose changes or extensions to the AgentSpec specification
title: "[SPEC] "
labels: specification
assignees: ''
---

## Title
A concise title for the specification proposal or change.

## Summary
A brief summary (1-2 paragraphs) of what is being proposed.

## Motivation
Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? What use cases does it enable?

## Detailed proposal
Detailed description of the proposed specification change, including:
- New concepts or terms being introduced
- Changes to existing structures or behaviors
- Examples of how this would be used in practice

## API/Format examples
Provide examples in the relevant format(s):

```typescript
// TypeScript example
```

```json
// JSON Schema or example
```

```python
# Python example
```

## Backwards compatibility
How does this affect existing specifications and implementations?
- [ ] Backwards compatible (existing code continues to work)
- [ ] Deprecation path (existing code deprecated with timeline)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires version bump and migration)

## Related work
Are there similar proposals or standards in other projects?

## Implementation considerations
What would it take to implement this in:
- TypeScript/Node.js
- Python
- Other languages/platforms

## Discussion
Any additional context, concerns, or discussion points?

## References
Links to related issues, discussions, or external references.
